background: Body weights of 18 diabetics expressed as a percentage of ideal (defined as body weight ÷ ideal body weight × 100) are shown here.

task.query: Construct a stem-and-leaf plot of these data and interpret your findings.
task.answer:

- Shape: The distribution has a negative skew and high outlier.
- Location: The median is 114 (underlined).
- Spread: Data range from 88 to 152.
